info.name: AntKart Microservices
info.description:
Unified Postman collection for all AntKart microservices.

**Services:**
- AK.Products REST API — http://localhost:5077
- AK.Discount gRPC — localhost:5001 (use grpcurl or Postman gRPC tab)
- AK.ShoppingCart REST API — http://localhost:5079

**Collection Variables:**
- `productsUrl` — Products API base URL (default: http://localhost:5077)
- `discountGrpc` — Discount gRPC host (default: localhost:5001)
- `cartUrl` — ShoppingCart API base URL (default: http://localhost:5079)
- `productId` — MongoDB ObjectId of a product (set after creating)
- `cartUserId` — User ID for cart operations (default: user-001)
- `cartProductId` — Product ID for cart item operations

variable.description: JWT access token — set automatically by the Login request test script

item.name: AK.Products API
item.description:
Product catalogue microservice — REST/HTTP on port 5077.
Swagger UI: http://localhost:5077/swagger

item.name: AK.Discount gRPC
item.description:
Discount coupon microservice — gRPC on port 5001.

Postman supports gRPC via the gRPC request type (New > gRPC Request).
Server reflection URL: http://localhost:5001
Proto file: AK.Discount/AK.Discount.Grpc/Protos/discount.proto

Alternatively use grpcurl:
  grpcurl -plaintext localhost:5001 list
  grpcurl -plaintext localhost:5001 discount.DiscountProtoService/GetAllDiscounts

Health check: GET http://localhost:5001/health

item.name: grpcurl — Get All Discounts (copy & run in terminal)

request.description:
Run this in your terminal:

grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"page":1,"page_size":10}' {{discountGrpc}} discount.DiscountProtoService/GetAllDiscounts

item.name: grpcurl — Get Discount by Product ID (copy & run in terminal)

request.description:
Run this in your terminal:

grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"product_id":"MEN-SHIR-001"}' {{discountGrpc}} discount.DiscountProtoService/GetDiscount

item.name: grpcurl — Create Discount (copy & run in terminal)

request.description:
Run this in your terminal:

grpcurl -plaintext -d '{
  "coupon": {
    "product_id": "MEN-SHIR-099",
    "product_name": "Test Shirt",
    "coupon_code": "SUMMER25",
    "description": "Summer sale 25% off",
    "amount": 25.0,
    "discount_type": "Percentage",
    "valid_from": "2026-04-01T00:00:00Z",
    "valid_to": "2026-08-31T23:59:59Z",
    "minimum_quantity": 1
  }
}' {{discountGrpc}} discount.DiscountProtoService/CreateDiscount

item.name: grpcurl — Update Discount (copy & run in terminal)

request.description:
Run this in your terminal (replace id with actual discount ID):

grpcurl -plaintext -d '{
  "id": 1,
  "coupon": {
    "product_name": "Updated Shirt",
    "description": "Updated discount",
    "amount": 30.0,
    "discount_type": "Percentage",
    "valid_from": "2026-04-01T00:00:00Z",
    "valid_to": "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z",
    "is_active": true,
    "minimum_quantity": 1
  }
}' {{discountGrpc}} discount.DiscountProtoService/UpdateDiscount

item.name: grpcurl — Delete Discount (copy & run in terminal)

request.description:
Run this in your terminal (replace id with actual discount ID):

grpcurl -plaintext -d '{"id": 1}' {{discountGrpc}} discount.DiscountProtoService/DeleteDiscount

item.name: AK.ShoppingCart API
item.description:
Shopping cart microservice — REST/HTTP on port 5079.
Swagger UI: http://localhost:5079/swagger
Redis-backed cart with 30-day TTL.

item.name: AK.UserIdentity API
item.description:
User identity microservice — Keycloak-backed auth proxy on port 5085.
Swagger UI: http://localhost:5085/swagger

Pre-seeded users:
- admin / admin123 (roles: admin, user)
- user1 / user123 (roles: user)

The Login request auto-saves the access token to {{accessToken}} collection variable.
